advisories.rationale: Verdict artifact; false-clean propagates as confidence.
Multi-artifact web-stack verdict; cross-cutting concerns require sustained judgment.
Game-engineering verdict over loop, canvas, and asset surfaces; restore cost is high.
Build and operations verdict over CI, deploy, and tooling mechanics; misread regressions propagate to release.
Specialist pass plus cross-cutting Criteria audit; tunes prior assessment into a coherent revision.
